detail: Own the venture end-to-end — brand, platform and the systems that run it. Local-business focus, built and led from the ground up.
Brand and creative production across print and digital — identity, social creative and motion graphics through the full Adobe suite.
Multimedia, design and web delivery — visual content, learning material and the front-end that presents it.

Drove organic + sponsored search, social and email marketing that increased car rentals. Created animated video & image adverts and built a WordPress appointment system tracking clients, payments, fines and maintenance — with budgeted email campaigns.
Built an online store, wrote the copy and sourced suppliers; redesigned the company logo in Illustrator & InDesign.
Designed a logo and mockups for an international sustainable-development initiative.
Bespoke design & installation. Built a Shopify store + drop-ship model during hard lockdown to protect cash flow and jobs — product design and reporting included.
Designed templates, booklets, animated video adverts and email campaign creative; advising, sales and data analytics.

org: The Unlimited · Old Mutual · Investors Choice
detail: Sales, lead generation and commercial foundations under the creative work — including, at Old Mutual's Welstand Agri division, a fully self-taught website build (online quotations and appointment booking) and a full rebrand: logo, contracts, client files, email templates and signage.
